name: Kit
desc: Email marketing built for creators (formerly ConvertKit). Grow your list with landing pages and forms, then automate newsletters and sell digital products from one place; a beta Kit MCP connects AI assistants like Claude directly to your account. Recent additions: a new landing-page editor, Dynamic Content, Newsletter Sponsorships, and App Store integrations on paid plans — SMS via SlickText, Patreon member sync (tier and support data in automations), Luma/Eventbrite event sync, and two-way HubSpot CRM sync on Pro.

name: UniTel Voice
desc: Virtual business phone system for small teams. Get a toll-free or local number with auto-attendant, call routing and a mobile app — no hardware.

name: Passpack
desc: Team password manager for small businesses. Store, share and organize credentials securely with role-based access, zero-knowledge encryption and shared team vaults — at a low per-user price.

name: ZoomInfo
desc: Enterprise B2B sales intelligence and contact database. Find verified company and contact data, buying signals and org charts to fuel outbound at scale.

name: Switcher Studio
desc: Multi-camera live video production from your iPhone and iPad. Stream, record and sell with professional switching, overlays and shopping integrations.

name: Blinq
desc: Digital business cards for modern networking. Share your contact details instantly via QR or link, and capture leads straight into your CRM.

name: VWO
desc: A/B testing and conversion optimization platform. Run experiments, heatmaps and personalization to lift conversions without developers.

name: Connecteam
desc: All-in-one app for managing deskless teams. Scheduling, time clock, tasks, training and team chat for hourly and frontline workforces.

name: BugHerd
desc: Visual bug tracking and website feedback. Let clients and teams point-and-click to report issues right on the page, turned into trackable tasks.

name: iContact
desc: Straightforward email marketing for growing businesses. Build campaigns and automations with drag-and-drop design and deliverability support.

name: Campaigner
desc: Advanced email and SMS marketing for mid-market teams. Build automated journeys, segment audiences and run A/B tests with detailed reporting.

name: LearnWorlds
desc: Create, sell and scale online courses. Build a branded school with interactive video, assessments, certificates and a built-in checkout.

name: WhatConverts
desc: Lead tracking and marketing attribution. Capture calls, forms and chats and tie every lead back to the campaign that drove it, for clear ROI.

name: Hopp
desc: Digital business cards and smart networking for teams. Share contact details instantly and capture leads, with branded cards your whole team can use.

name: Carbon6
desc: A suite of tools for Amazon and e-commerce sellers. Recover lost FBA reimbursements, optimize advertising and protect your listings to grow and defend your store.

name: Housecall Pro
desc: Field service management for home-service businesses. Schedule jobs, dispatch techs, send quotes and invoices, and take payments from one app.

name: Spocket
desc: Dropshipping platform with vetted US and EU suppliers. Find fast-shipping products, add them to your store in a click and automate order fulfillment.

name: CallRail
desc: Call tracking and marketing attribution. See which campaigns, keywords and ads drive phone calls and form leads, with recordings and analytics to prove ROI.

name: Aspire
desc: All-in-one finance stack for global businesses: multi-currency accounts (30+ currencies), corporate cards with 1.2% cashback, expense management, bill pay, payments and payroll — with AI fraud detection and multi-admin approval workflows.

name: Checkr
desc: AI-powered background check and screening platform for hiring: fast criminal, employment and identity verification with automated adjudication and ATS integrations — speeds up onboarding while staying FCRA-compliant.

name: Freshchat
desc: AI-powered customer messaging from Freshworks: live chat and chatbots across your website, app, WhatsApp and Instagram, with a unified agent inbox and automation that deflects repetitive questions.

name: Birch
desc: Ad automation for performance marketers (formerly Revealbot): rule-based optimization, automated scaling and creative insights across Meta, Google, TikTok and Snapchat — run and optimize ad campaigns on autopilot.

name: Freshservice
desc: AI-powered IT service management (ITSM) from Freshworks: cloud help desk, ticketing, asset management and workflow automation to run IT support and internal service desks without heavy ITIL overhead.

name: AWeber
desc: Email marketing and automation for small businesses and creators: drag-and-drop newsletters, landing pages, autoresponders and sign-up forms with AI writing help — one of the longest-running email platforms.

name: InboxAlly
desc: Email deliverability tool that trains your sender reputation: engagement-based signals keep your campaigns and cold outreach out of spam and in the primary inbox — works alongside any ESP or email platform.

name: Gelato
desc: Global print-on-demand platform: design, produce and ship custom products (apparel, wall art, mugs, photo books) locally in 30+ countries with no inventory — integrates with Shopify, Etsy and WooCommerce.

name: AfterSell
desc: Post-purchase upsell and cross-sell app for Shopify (by Rokt): one-click upsells, downsells and thank-you-page offers plus checkout customization to lift average order value — no extra ad spend.

name: SMTP.com
desc: Reliable transactional and bulk email delivery via SMTP relay and API: high-deliverability sending for app notifications, receipts and campaigns, with real-time analytics and dedicated IPs — built for volume senders.

name: 1Password
desc: Password manager and security platform for teams: store and share passwords, passkeys and secrets with autofill, breach monitoring and developer secrets management — enterprise-grade vaults with simple admin controls.

name: Stamped
desc: Reviews, ratings and loyalty platform for e-commerce: collect product reviews and user-generated content, run rewards and loyalty programs, and show social proof to lift conversions on Shopify and other stores.

name: Streak
desc: CRM built directly inside Gmail: manage pipelines, leads and deals from your inbox with email tracking, mail merge and shared views — ideal for teams that live in Google Workspace.

name: Wati
desc: WhatsApp Business API platform for sales and support: shared team inbox, bulk broadcasts and no-code chatbots — plus Astra, its AI agent builder for agents that actually resolve conversations (orders, refunds, bookings, lead qualification) across WhatsApp, web and voice. Its omnichannel inbox now also carries TikTok DMs natively (all plans, no extra cost) alongside Instagram and RCS — with ad-to-chat context that shows exactly which TikTok ad triggered a conversation.

name: Tapstitch
desc: Fashion-first print-on-demand for brand-builders: premium heavyweight blanks (streetwear tees, oversized hoodies), bigger print areas and made-to-order apparel with no inventory — integrates with Shopify.

name: Getscreen
desc: Browser-based remote desktop and remote-support software: connect to any computer with no client install, share one-click access links, transfer files and record sessions — for IT teams, MSPs and remote support.

name: Instapage
desc: Enterprise landing-page and conversion platform: build, personalize and A/B-test post-click landing pages at scale, with ad-to-page mapping, heatmaps and fast AMP pages — built for paid-ads and demand-gen teams.

name: Feedvisor
desc: AI-driven Amazon and retail-media optimization: dynamic repricing, ad automation and analytics for brands and larger sellers on Amazon and Walmart.

name: TicketTailor
desc: Low-fee event ticketing and box-office software: sell tickets online, manage check-in and keep more of your revenue without per-ticket booking fees.

name: Auware
desc: AI-built, audience-specific Shopify pages: automatically generates a personalized page per buyer persona — not just landing pages but advertorials, listicles, comparison and product (PDP) pages — with targeted headlines, social proof and FAQs, plus per-segment analytics. Built to lift ad conversion for DTC brands. No code.

name: Zeffy
desc: 100% free fundraising and donation platform for nonprofits: ticketing, donation forms and payments with no platform fees.

name: SurveyMonkey
desc: Survey and feedback platform: build surveys, collect responses at scale and analyze results for market research, CX and employee feedback.

name: Pipedrive
desc: Sales-first CRM built around a visual pipeline: track deals, automate follow-ups and forecast revenue — designed for small and mid-size sales teams.

name: Notify Me
desc: Shopify app to recover lost sales on out-of-stock products: back-in-stock notifications, pre-orders and wishlists that keep customers buying instead of bouncing.

name: HiBob
desc: Modern HR platform (Bob): HRIS, onboarding, time-off and people analytics for growing companies that want culture-first HR without enterprise bloat.

name: Kixie
desc: Sales engagement with a power dialer: automated calling and SMS, CRM integration and call analytics to help reps connect with more leads, faster.

name: Finale Inventory
desc: Inventory and warehouse management for e-commerce and wholesale: multi-channel stock sync, purchasing and barcode workflows that scale with order volume.

name: Beefree
desc: Drag-and-drop email and landing-page design (BEE): build responsive, on-brand emails fast and export to any major ESP — no coding required.

name: Crazy Egg
desc: Website optimization with heatmaps, scroll maps, session recordings and A/B testing — see how visitors behave and lift conversions with data.

name: Wing Assistant
desc: Managed virtual assistants for founders and teams: delegate admin, inbox, scheduling and repetitive tasks to a dedicated, trained assistant.

name: SimpleTexting
desc: SMS marketing and business texting: run mass-text campaigns, two-way conversations and automations with compliance built in.

name: Dext
desc: Bookkeeping automation: capture receipts and invoices, extract the data automatically and sync to your accounting software — less manual entry.

name: Fireflies.ai
desc: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes and summarizes your calls across Zoom, Google Meet and Teams — searchable notes, action items and CRM sync, so nobody takes minutes by hand.

name: Pixel Union
desc: Premium Shopify themes and store apps for online retailers: professionally designed, conversion-focused storefronts without custom development.

name: Tenable
desc: Exposure and vulnerability management (makers of Nessus): scan, prioritize and remediate security weaknesses across IT, cloud and OT — for security teams of any size.

name: Riverside
desc: AI-powered studio to record studio-quality podcasts and video remotely — then edit, transcribe and repurpose into clips, all in the browser.

name: ZenZap
desc: Secure work-chat for teams — organized channels, built-in tasks and workflows, AI agents and admin controls, as easy to use as texting.

name: Uniqode
desc: Dynamic QR codes and digital business cards with real-time scan analytics — connect offline touchpoints to measurable results and capture leads.

name: Shoeboxed
desc: Turn paper and digital receipts into organized, IRS-ready expense data with OCR plus human verification — syncs with QuickBooks and Xero.

name: Sellfy
desc: No-code store builder for creators to sell digital products, subscriptions and print-on-demand merch — with zero transaction fees and built-in social-media selling.

name: Tellent
desc: Modular people-management platform — applicant tracking (Recruitee), core HR and performance management with AI automation, for hiring and managing teams.

name: VidPal
desc: Autonomous content engine for faceless and topic-based channels: it discovers trending stories in your niche, auto-generates short-form videos and carousels with AI voiceovers, and auto-publishes them across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and more.

name: LettrLabs
desc: Automated direct-mail marketing: design, personalise and send physical mailers — handwritten letters, postcards — at scale, synced with your digital campaigns and tracked for ROI.

name: ExpertEx
desc: A unified AI studio: chat across multiple models (GPT-4, Gemini), generate images, video and voice, and reuse prompts — multilingual, all in one workspace.

name: Guesty
desc: All-in-one management for short-term and vacation rentals: unify bookings, guest messaging, channel distribution and pricing across 60+ channels (Airbnb, Vrbo and more) in one dashboard.

name: Alvys
desc: Cloud-native transportation management system (TMS) unifying trucking carriers and freight brokers in one platform — dispatch, billing, DOT/IFTA compliance, real-time load visibility and native EDI (no third-party middleware), so new shippers connect in hours rather than weeks.

name: Prezi
desc: AI presentation maker for dynamic, non-linear decks that stand out from standard slides — turn ideas into polished, interactive presentations fast.

name: QuickSigner
desc: Legally-binding e-signatures with unlimited documents and no per-envelope caps: send a secure link and recipients sign from any device without creating an account. ISO/IEC 27001-certified, AATL signatures, valid across the US, UK and EU — a fair-priced DocuSign alternative.

name: Plansom
desc: AI project management and work OS for teams: organise tasks, goals and collaboration, with AI that helps prioritise what actually moves the needle.

name: Superfiliate
desc: Creator-led growth for D2C brands: run influencer, affiliate and referral programs in one platform across Shopify, Meta and TikTok Shop — discovery, automation, gifting and revenue tracking.

name: Dryground AI
desc: Full-stack AI implementation services: helps businesses design and integrate AI across their tech stack — for teams that want AI built and shipped, not just advised.

name: Sendcloud
desc: European e-commerce shipping platform: connect 160+ carriers, print labels in batches, show delivery options at checkout, send branded tracking (email, WhatsApp, SMS) and run a self-service returns portal — with rules-based shipping automation. Free plan available.

name: AgencyAnalytics
desc: Client reporting and dashboards built for marketing agencies: aggregate 80+ marketing platforms into white-label dashboards and automated reports, with per-client KPI goals. White-labeling on every plan.

name: Healthie
desc: All-in-one practice management and EHR for health, wellness and nutrition providers: scheduling, telehealth, secure messaging, billing and a branded client portal — plus a full API (GraphQL + webhooks) for automation. Built to scale with group practices.

name: Arbor
desc: Free US service that automatically finds and switches you to a cheaper electricity supply rate in the 13 deregulated states (Northeast, Midwest, Texas). Your utility and wiring stay the same, no service interruption, cancel anytime — Arbor is paid a referral fee by the supplier, so households pay nothing.

name: Shore
desc: Booking and business software for local service businesses (salons, barbers, wellness, coaches): 24/7 online appointments via your website, Google and Instagram, calendar and staff scheduling, client profiles, automated reminders that cut no-shows, plus email marketing and POS. Fixed monthly price with unlimited bookings — no per-booking commission.

name: Velora
desc: Unified operations platform for nonprofits: Keela (donor CRM), Aplos (fund accounting) and Raisely (online fundraising) as one connected suite — donor management, campaigns and finances built for charities instead of adapted from business software.

name: Hello Bar
desc: Popup and notification-bar tool for lead capture: sticky bars, popups, slide-ins and full-screen takeovers that turn visitors into subscribers — with A/B testing, targeting rules and 20+ email-tool integrations.

name: PushOwl
desc: Shopify web-push and omnichannel marketing, now part of Brevo. One-click push lets stores re-engage shoppers who never leave an email — recovering abandoned carts and browsing sessions — then layer in email, SMS and WhatsApp on Brevo's deliverability stack. Usage-based pricing: you pay for what you send, not list size.

name: Claude
desc: Anthropic's AI assistant for writing, coding, analysis and long-document work — strong reasoning and a careful, direct tone rather than an eager-to-please one. Free tier plus Pro, Max, Team and Enterprise plans, and a per-token API (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) for builders.

name: UltaHost
desc: Budget-friendly web hosting across shared, VPS, WordPress and dedicated plans — NVMe SSD storage, free SSL and migration, DDoS protection and 24/7 multilingual support, from 30+ global data centers.

name: Descript
desc: AI-powered video and podcast editor: edit media by editing the text transcript — cut, overdub and remove filler words like editing a doc — with screen recording, AI voice cloning and an AI assistant (Underlord) built in.

name: Miro
desc: Visual collaboration platform: an infinite online whiteboard for brainstorms, diagrams, workshops and planning — with templates, voting and AI that generates diagrams and summaries, built for real-time and async teamwork.

name: Circle
desc: Community platform for creator businesses: discussions, courses, events, memberships and messaging in one branded home — plus a no-code website builder, branded iOS/Android apps, email marketing, a member CRM, built-in payments and AI agents that answer member questions.

name: Survicate
desc: Customer feedback platform for continuous surveys: NPS, CSAT and in-product micro-surveys across web, in-app, email and link — with templates, audience targeting and native integrations that pipe feedback straight into your CRM and analytics.

name: Restream
desc: Live streaming studio and multistreaming platform: broadcast one show simultaneously to YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitch and 30+ destinations from your browser — with guests, local recordings, captions and scheduled broadcasts.

name: Momence
desc: Booking and business management for class-based businesses — yoga and fitness studios, gyms, salons and schools: scheduling, memberships, payments, marketing automations and a member app in one place.

name: Heard
desc: Done-for-you bookkeeping and taxes built for therapists and a growing range of health-and-wellness practices — SLPs, dieticians, chiropractors, audiologists, coaches, massage and physical therapists: monthly books, quarterly tax estimates, annual filing and S-corp support by specialists who know the niche.

name: Evolve
desc: AI-native training and enablement platform for enterprises: an LMS with branded academies, an AI course generator, job-skill simulations with AI counterparts, an assessment center and performance analytics — used by 100+ deployed enterprises.

name: ExpertSender
desc: E-commerce marketing automation with a built-in customer data platform: email, SMS, web and mobile push plus on-site messages, behavior-triggered workflows, product recommendations and segmentation on unified store data.

name: FlexiQuiz
desc: Online quiz and test maker for educators, trainers and businesses: build graded exams, assessments and simple courses with certificates, timed tests, question banks and analytics — from a genuinely free tier.

name: ElevenLabs
desc: Market-leading AI voice platform: hyper-realistic text-to-speech, voice cloning, dubbing, sound effects and conversational agents — with a developer API and a free tier to test voices before you pay.
